title: Nuby Lots A Loops Teething Ring – Soothing Teether | Built-in Rattle Toy | Refrigerator Safe | Suitable from 3 Months Plus
features: SOOTHING TEETHER – Teething isn't likely to be lots-a-fun but this colourful, chewy teether toy with lots-a-loops and a built-in rattle is perfect for teething tots, suitable from 3 months old.
STAY COOL - They are easy for little hands to hold and can be put in the fridge for extra cooling relief for your little one’s sore gums.

ORAL DEVELOPMENT - Encourages oral motor skills, helping the development of lips, tongue, jaw, and the hard and soft palates. The movement of which are particularly important in speech development, safe swallowing, and consuming various textures.
STIMULATION - Helps to soothe and massage painful gums as well as keeping baby stimulated with fun rattle noise and lots of colours.
TEETHING RANGE – At Nuby, we pride ourselves on guiding (new) parents every step of the way: this baby teething RING is part of our fantastic teething collection, available through our Store Front.
description: Product Description Nuby Lots A Loops Teething Ring – Soothing Teether Teething isn't likely to be lots-a-fun but this chewy toy with lots-a-loops and a built-in rattle is perfect for teething tots. The bright coloured loops make this a firm favourite with your baby, and it'll provide much needed relief for sore teeth and gums. Easy for little hands to grab and hold, it's the perfect teether and rattle toy combo! All better yet? You can even pop it in the fridge to give baby a cooler, resilient surfaces to gently soothe baby and stimulate sore gums. Nuby, every step of the way Box Contains 1 x Lots A Loops Teether Manufacturer Contact Information Nûby UK LLP, 13 Burford Way, Boldon Business Park, Boldon Colliery, Newcastle upon Tyne, NE35 9PZ. See more
